title: 「Whenever / Whatever / Whichever / However / Whoever / Wherever」句型
titleEn: Whenever / Whatever / Whichever / However / Whoever / Wherever clauses

source.file: Sentence Structure 83 -「Whenever _ Whatever _ Whichever _ However _ Whoever _ Wherever 句」.pdf

formulas.formula: Whichever + singular noun + subject + verb, main clause
However + adjective/adverb + subject + verb, main clause

example: Whenever the evidence changes, responsible people adjust their view.
exampleZh: 每當證據改變，負責任的人就會調整自己的看法。

examples.en: Whenever the evidence changes, responsible people adjust their view.
examples.zh: 每當證據改變，負責任的人就會調整自己的看法。

examples.en: Whatever you decide, explain the reason clearly.
examples.zh: 無論你作出甚麼決定，都要清楚說明原因。

examples.en: However difficult the task seems, it becomes manageable when broken into steps.
examples.zh: 無論任務看起來多困難，只要把它分成步驟，就會變得容易處理。

meaning.zh: 這些句型通常用來表達「無論……」、「任何……」或「每當……」的意思。

rules.zh: 六個句型分別表示時間、事物或想法、有限選擇、程度或方式、人物及地點。
rules.en: The six structures refer respectively to time, things or ideas, limited choices, degree or manner, people and places.

rules.zh: 選擇沒有明確範圍時使用 whatever；選擇來自已知或有限組別時使用 whichever。
rules.en: Use whatever for choices without a clear limit and whichever for a known or limited group.

rules.zh: However 後面接形容詞或副詞。
rules.en: However is followed by an adjective or adverb.

rules.zh: Whenever 引出未來情況時，使用現在式而不是 will。
rules.en: Use the present tense after whenever for future situations.

rules.zh: 當 whoever 是動作的執行者時，後面通常使用單數動詞。
rules.en: When whoever performs the action, it is normally followed by a singular verb.

rules.zh: Wh-ever 子句放在句首時使用逗號；主句在前時通常不需要逗號。
rules.en: Use a comma when the wh-ever clause comes first; a comma is normally unnecessary when the main clause comes first.

rules.zh: 正確拼法是 wherever，不是 whereever。
rules.en: The correct spelling is wherever, not whereever.

benefits.zh: 每個句型都能清楚指出所談論的是時間、事物、選擇、人物、地點還是程度。
benefits.en: It makes the exact meaning clearer.

benefits.zh: 這些句型可以把一個情況和相應結果自然地連接在同一句中。
benefits.en: It joins two related ideas naturally.

benefits.zh: 它們能代替「誰並不重要」、「在任何地方」或「每一次」等較長說法。
Whatever you decide… 和 However difficult it is… 等句型可成為現成的說話框架。
benefits.en: It provides a useful speaking frame.

benefits.zh: 它能先承認不同情況或可能性，再清楚指出主要結論不變。
benefits.en: It helps you express a firm or balanced position.

benefits.zh: 它讓你可以用時間、選擇、程度、人物或地點開始句子，避免每句都以主語開始。
benefits.en: It gives your sentences more variety.

en: Rewrite each sentence using whenever, whatever, whichever, however, whoever or wherever.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 whenever、whatever、whichever、however、whoever 或 wherever 改寫以下句子。
答案必須保留原句的意思。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Every time I feel tired, I take a short break.
questions.promptZh: 每當我感到疲倦，我便休息一會。
questions.answer: Whenever I feel tired, I take a short break.
questions.answerZh: 每當我感到疲倦，我便休息一會。
questions.highlight: Whenever I feel tired, I take a short break.

questions.prompt: It does not matter what you choose. I will support you.
questions.promptZh: 你選擇甚麼並不重要。我都會支持你。
questions.answer: Whatever you choose, I will support you.
questions.answerZh: 無論你選擇甚麼，我都會支持你。
questions.highlight: Whatever you choose, I will support you.

questions.prompt: You may borrow any one of these books, but you must return it on time.
questions.promptZh: 你可以借這些書中的任何一本，但必須準時歸還。
questions.answer: Whichever book you borrow, return it on time.
questions.answerZh: 無論你借哪一本書，都要準時歸還。
questions.highlight: Whichever book you borrow, return it on time.

questions.prompt: Maya may be very busy, but she still calls her grandmother.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅可能非常忙，但她仍會致電祖母。
questions.answer: However busy Maya is, she calls her grandmother.
questions.answerZh: 無論瑪雅多忙，她都會致電祖母。
questions.highlight: However busy Maya is, she calls her grandmother.

questions.prompt: Any person who finishes first can leave the room.
questions.promptZh: 任何最先完成的人都可以離開房間。
questions.answer: Whoever finishes first can leave the room.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰最先完成，都可以離開房間。
questions.highlight: Whoever finishes first can leave the room.

questions.prompt: We take a map to every place we travel to.
questions.promptZh: 我們每到一個旅行地點都會帶備地圖。
questions.answer: Wherever we travel, we take a map.
questions.answerZh: 無論我們到哪裏旅行，都會帶備地圖。
questions.highlight: Wherever we travel, we take a map.

questions.prompt: Each time the bell rings, the students line up.
questions.promptZh: 每次鐘聲響起，學生便會排隊。
questions.answer: Whenever the bell rings, the students line up.
questions.answerZh: 每當鐘聲響起，學生便會排隊。
questions.highlight: Whenever the bell rings, the students line up.

questions.prompt: No matter what happens, stay calm.
questions.promptZh: 無論發生甚麼事，都要保持冷靜。
questions.answer: Whatever happens, stay calm.
questions.answerZh: 無論發生甚麼事，都要保持冷靜。
questions.highlight: Whatever happens, stay calm.

questions.prompt: It does not matter which seat you take. You will have a clear view.
questions.promptZh: 你坐哪個座位並不重要。你都會看得很清楚。
questions.answer: Whichever seat you take, you will have a clear view.
questions.answerZh: 無論你坐哪個座位，都會看得很清楚。
questions.highlight: Whichever seat you take, you will have a clear view.

questions.prompt: Leo’s dog follows him to every place he goes.
questions.promptZh: 里奧的狗會跟着他到每一個他去的地方。
questions.answer: Wherever Leo goes, his dog follows him.
questions.answerZh: 無論里奧到哪裏，他的狗都會跟着他。
questions.highlight: Wherever Leo goes, his dog follows him.

questions.prompt: Even if you walk very slowly, you will reach the station if you keep moving.
questions.promptZh: 即使你走得非常慢，只要繼續前進，仍會到達車站。
questions.answer: However slowly you walk, you will reach the station if you keep moving.
questions.answerZh: 無論你走得多慢，只要繼續前進，仍會到達車站。
questions.highlight: However slowly you walk, you will reach the station if you keep moving.

questions.prompt: The person who answers correctly will get one point.
questions.promptZh: 答對的人會獲得一分。
questions.answer: Whoever answers correctly will get one point.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰答對，都會獲得一分。
questions.highlight: Whoever answers correctly will get one point.

questions.prompt: Every time Amy visits the library, she borrows a mystery novel.
questions.promptZh: 艾米每次到圖書館，都會借一本推理小說。
questions.answer: Whenever Amy visits the library, she borrows a mystery novel.
questions.answerZh: 每當艾米到圖書館，她都會借一本推理小說。
questions.highlight: Whenever Amy visits the library, she borrows a mystery novel.

questions.prompt: The players listen carefully to any advice the coach gives.
questions.promptZh: 球員會仔細聆聽教練提出的任何建議。
questions.answer: Whatever advice the coach gives, the players listen carefully.
questions.answerZh: 無論教練提出甚麼建議，球員都會仔細聆聽。
questions.highlight: Whatever advice the coach gives, the players listen carefully.

questions.prompt: The price will be the same no matter which colour you select.
questions.promptZh: 無論你選哪種顏色，價錢都一樣。
questions.answer: Whichever colour you select, the price will be the same.
questions.answerZh: 無論你選哪種顏色，價錢都一樣。
questions.highlight: Whichever colour you select, the price will be the same.

questions.prompt: I will wait for you at any bus stop where you get off.
questions.promptZh: 我會在你下車的任何一個巴士站等你。
questions.answer: Wherever you get off the bus, I will wait for you.
questions.answerZh: 無論你在哪個巴士站下車，我都會等你。
questions.highlight: Wherever you get off the bus, I will wait for you.

questions.prompt: Even if the water is extremely cold, Ben swims every morning.
questions.promptZh: 即使水非常冷，本每天早上仍會游泳。
questions.answer: However cold the water is, Ben swims every morning.
questions.answerZh: 無論水多冷，本每天早上都會游泳。
questions.highlight: However cold the water is, Ben swims every morning.

questions.prompt: Ask the receptionist for anything you need.
questions.promptZh: 你需要任何東西，都可以向接待員提出要求。
questions.answer: Whatever you need, ask the receptionist.
questions.answerZh: 無論你需要甚麼，都可以向接待員提出。
questions.highlight: Whatever you need, ask the receptionist.

questions.prompt: We will congratulate the players regardless of which team wins.
questions.promptZh: 不論哪一隊勝出，我們都會祝賀球員。
questions.answer: Whichever team wins, we will congratulate the players.
questions.answerZh: 無論哪一隊勝出，我們都會祝賀球員。
questions.highlight: Whichever team wins, we will congratulate the players.

questions.prompt: Please take a message for any person who calls.
questions.promptZh: 請替任何致電的人留言。
questions.answer: Whoever calls, please take a message.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰致電，都請留言。
questions.highlight: Whoever calls, please take a message.

questions.prompt: The workers continue the repairs every time the weather improves.
questions.promptZh: 天氣每次好轉，工人便繼續維修工作。
questions.answer: Whenever the weather improves, the workers continue the repairs.
questions.answerZh: 每當天氣好轉，工人便繼續維修工作。
questions.highlight: Whenever the weather improves, the workers continue the repairs.

questions.prompt: Maya keeps the receipt for anything she buys.
questions.promptZh: 瑪雅會保留她所購買任何物品的收據。
questions.answer: Whatever Maya buys, she keeps the receipt.
questions.answerZh: 無論瑪雅買甚麼，她都會保留收據。
questions.highlight: Whatever Maya buys, she keeps the receipt.

questions.prompt: You may use any computer that is free.
questions.promptZh: 你可以使用任何一部空置的電腦。
questions.answer: You may use whichever computer is free.
questions.answerZh: 你可以使用任何一部空置的電腦。
questions.highlight: You may use whichever computer is free.

questions.prompt: No matter how carefully Noah plans, unexpected problems can still occur.
questions.promptZh: 無論諾亞計劃得多仔細，仍可能出現意料之外的問題。
questions.answer: However carefully Noah plans, unexpected problems can still occur.
questions.answerZh: 無論諾亞計劃得多仔細，仍可能出現意料之外的問題。
questions.highlight: However carefully Noah plans, unexpected problems can still occur.

questions.prompt: The person who is responsible must report the mistake.
questions.promptZh: 負責的人必須報告這個錯誤。
questions.answer: Whoever is responsible must report the mistake.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰需要負責，都必須報告這個錯誤。
questions.highlight: Whoever is responsible must report the mistake.

questions.prompt: The rescue team will search in any place where the signal leads them.
questions.promptZh: 救援隊會搜尋訊號引領他們前往的任何地方。
questions.answer: The rescue team will search wherever the signal leads them.
questions.answerZh: 救援隊會搜尋訊號引領他們前往的任何地方。
questions.highlight: The rescue team will search wherever the signal leads them.

questions.prompt: Wear safety glasses every time you use this machine.
questions.promptZh: 每次使用這部機器時，都要戴上護目鏡。
questions.answer: Whenever you use this machine, wear safety glasses.
questions.answerZh: 每當你使用這部機器，都要戴上護目鏡。
questions.highlight: Whenever you use this machine, wear safety glasses.

questions.prompt: The manager will check the facts regardless of the explanation Daniel offers.
questions.promptZh: 不論丹尼爾提出甚麼解釋，經理都會核實事實。
questions.answer: Whatever explanation Daniel offers, the manager will check the facts.
questions.answerZh: 無論丹尼爾提出甚麼解釋，經理都會核實事實。
questions.highlight: Whatever explanation Daniel offers, the manager will check the facts.

questions.prompt: The journey lasts about an hour regardless of which route the driver takes.
questions.promptZh: 不論司機選哪條路線，車程都大約一小時。
questions.answer: Whichever route the driver takes, the journey lasts about an hour.
questions.answerZh: 無論司機選哪條路線，車程都大約一小時。
questions.highlight: Whichever route the driver takes, the journey lasts about an hour.

questions.prompt: The school must fix the broken lift regardless of how expensive the repair is.
questions.promptZh: 不論維修費多昂貴，學校都必須修理損壞的升降機。
questions.answer: However expensive the repair is, the school must fix the broken lift.
questions.answerZh: 無論維修費多昂貴，學校都必須修理損壞的升降機。
questions.highlight: However expensive the repair is, the school must fix the broken lift.

questions.prompt: The person who left this note forgot to sign it.
questions.promptZh: 留下這張字條的人忘記簽名。
questions.answer: Whoever left this note forgot to sign it.
questions.answerZh: 無論是誰留下這張字條，那人都忘記了簽名。
questions.highlight: Whoever left this note forgot to sign it.

questions.prompt: It does not matter where the medicine is stored; it must be kept away from children.
questions.promptZh: 藥物存放在哪裏並不重要；它必須放在兒童接觸不到的地方。
questions.answer: Wherever the medicine is stored, it must be kept away from children.
questions.answerZh: 無論藥物存放在哪裏，都必須放在兒童接觸不到的地方。
questions.highlight: Wherever the medicine is stored, it must be kept away from children.

questions.prompt: The lights switch on every time someone enters the corridor.
questions.promptZh: 每次有人走進走廊，燈便會亮起。
questions.answer: The lights switch on whenever someone enters the corridor.
questions.answerZh: 每當有人走進走廊，燈便會亮起。
questions.highlight: The lights switch on whenever someone enters the corridor.

questions.prompt: The committee must explain the reasons for any decision it makes.
questions.promptZh: 委員會必須為它作出的任何決定解釋原因。
questions.answer: Whatever decision the committee makes, it must explain the reasons.
questions.answerZh: 無論委員會作出甚麼決定，都必須解釋原因。
questions.highlight: Whatever decision the committee makes, it must explain the reasons.

questions.prompt: You may choose any of the available payment methods. Select the one that is most convenient for you.
questions.promptZh: 你可以在現有的付款方式中任選一種。請選擇對你最方便的一種。
questions.answer: Choose whichever payment method is most convenient for you.
questions.answerZh: 請選擇對你最方便的任何一種付款方式。
questions.highlight: Choose whichever payment method is most convenient for you.

questions.prompt: The audience should examine the evidence no matter how confidently the speaker presents the claim.
questions.promptZh: 不論講者多有自信地提出這項主張，聽眾都應檢視證據。
questions.answer: However confidently the speaker presents the claim, the audience should examine the evidence.
questions.answerZh: 無論講者多有自信地提出這項主張，聽眾都應檢視證據。
questions.highlight: However confidently the speaker presents the claim, the audience should examine the evidence.

questions.prompt: Any person who receives the parcel should check the address.
questions.promptZh: 收到包裹的人應核對地址。
questions.answer: Whoever receives the parcel should check the address.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰收到包裹，都應核對地址。
questions.highlight: Whoever receives the parcel should check the address.

questions.prompt: We can hold the meeting in any place that has enough space.
questions.promptZh: 我們可以在任何有足夠空間的地方舉行會議。
questions.answer: We can hold the meeting wherever there is enough space.
questions.answerZh: 我們可以在任何有足夠空間的地方舉行會議。
questions.highlight: We can hold the meeting wherever there is enough space.

questions.prompt: A complaint is recorded in the system every time it is received.
questions.promptZh: 每次收到投訴，投訴都會記錄在系統內。
questions.answer: Whenever a complaint is received, it is recorded in the system.
questions.answerZh: 每當收到投訴，投訴都會記錄在系統內。
questions.highlight: Whenever a complaint is received, it is recorded in the system.

questions.prompt: The final result may be good or bad, but the team has learnt from the project in either case.
questions.promptZh: 最終結果可能好，也可能不好，但無論如何，團隊都從這個項目中汲取了經驗。
questions.answer: Whatever the final result may be, the team has learnt from the project.
questions.answerZh: 無論最終結果如何，團隊都從這個項目中汲取了經驗。
questions.highlight: Whatever the final result may be, the team has learnt from the project.

questions.prompt: The new manager will need time to learn the role regardless of which candidate the company appoints.
questions.promptZh: 公司不論委任哪位候選人，新任經理都需要時間熟習職務。
questions.answer: Whichever candidate the company appoints, the new manager will need time to learn the role.
questions.answerZh: 無論公司委任哪位候選人，新任經理都需要時間熟習職務。
questions.highlight: Whichever candidate the company appoints, the new manager will need time to learn the role.

questions.prompt: The programme should protect essential services regardless of how limited the budget is.
questions.promptZh: 不論預算多有限，該計劃仍應保障基本服務。
questions.answer: However limited the budget is, the programme should protect essential services.
questions.answerZh: 無論預算多有限，該計劃都應保障基本服務。
questions.highlight: However limited the budget is, the programme should protect essential services.

questions.prompt: Any person who uses the shared kitchen is expected to clean it afterwards.
questions.promptZh: 使用共用廚房的人都應在之後清潔廚房。
questions.answer: Whoever uses the shared kitchen is expected to clean it afterwards.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰使用共用廚房，都應在之後清潔廚房。
questions.highlight: Whoever uses the shared kitchen is expected to clean it afterwards.

questions.prompt: The researcher must record the result, regardless of what it shows.
questions.promptZh: 不論結果顯示甚麼，研究人員都必須記錄該結果。
questions.answer: The researcher must record the result whatever it shows.
questions.answerZh: 無論結果顯示甚麼，研究人員都必須記錄該結果。
questions.highlight: The researcher must record the result whatever it shows.

questions.prompt: It does not matter where the new clinic is built. It should be easy to reach by public transport.
questions.promptZh: 新診所建在哪裏並不重要；它都應該方便乘搭公共交通前往。
questions.answer: Wherever the new clinic is built, it should be easy to reach by public transport.
questions.answerZh: 無論新診所建在哪裏，都應方便乘搭公共交通前往。
questions.highlight: Wherever the new clinic is built, it should be easy to reach by public transport.

questions.prompt: Responsible decision-makers should reconsider their position each time new evidence appears.
questions.promptZh: 每次出現新證據，負責任的決策者都應重新考慮自己的立場。
questions.answer: Whenever new evidence appears, responsible decision-makers should reconsider their position.
questions.answerZh: 每當出現新證據，負責任的決策者都應重新考慮自己的立場。
questions.highlight: Whenever new evidence appears, responsible decision-makers should reconsider their position.

questions.prompt: The council should respond with clear information to any concerns raised by residents.
questions.promptZh: 議會應以清晰資料回應居民提出的任何憂慮。
questions.answer: Whatever concerns residents raise, the council should respond with clear information.
questions.answerZh: 無論居民提出甚麼憂慮，議會都應以清晰資料回應。
questions.highlight: Whatever concerns residents raise, the council should respond with clear information.

questions.prompt: The team must publish a realistic timetable regardless of which proposal receives approval.
questions.promptZh: 不論哪份建議獲得批准，團隊都必須公布切實可行的時間表。
questions.answer: Whichever proposal receives approval, the team must publish a realistic timetable.
questions.answerZh: 無論哪份建議獲得批准，團隊都必須公布切實可行的時間表。
questions.highlight: Whichever proposal receives approval, the team must publish a realistic timetable.

questions.prompt: Both sides should continue to speak respectfully no matter how serious the disagreement becomes.
questions.promptZh: 不論分歧變得多嚴重，雙方仍應繼續互相尊重地溝通。
questions.answer: However serious the disagreement becomes, both sides should continue to speak respectfully.
questions.answerZh: 無論分歧變得多嚴重，雙方都應繼續互相尊重地溝通。
questions.highlight: However serious the disagreement becomes, both sides should continue to speak respectfully.

questions.prompt: Any person who leads the project must make sure that support is available in every place where problems arise.
questions.promptZh: 領導這個項目的人必須確保在出現問題的每個地方都能獲得支援。
questions.answer: Whoever leads the project must make sure that support is available wherever problems arise.
questions.answerZh: 無論誰領導這個項目，都必須確保無論哪裏出現問題，都能獲得支援。
questions.highlight: Whoever leads the project must make sure that support is available wherever problems arise.
